subject: [PATCH v1 2/4] fuse: get rid of err_unlock goto in fuse_dev_do_read()

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Proposed removing an unnecessary goto statement in fuse_dev_do_read() to simplify the code. Identified a single user of this goto and suggested its removal.

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch series aims to simplify the fuse code by removing an unnecessary goto statement in fuse_dev_do_read(). The change removes a single user of this goto and makes the code more straightforward.
